# Master Programme Overview

Intro paragraph about the programme without much detail here.

## Language Requirements

Applicants must provide proof of English proficiency.

### Accepted certificates

IELTS minimum band is six point five overall.
TOEFL iBT minimum total score is eighty eight.

## Application Steps

First create an account on the university portal system.

Second upload your bachelor transcript and curriculum vitae now.

Third request a preliminary review documentation if it is required.

Fourth submit the online application before the stated official deadline.

Fifth pay the processing fee through the official payment gateway.

Sixth wait for the evaluation result within several weeks normally.
